rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §37.023, which governs student transitions from alternative education programs to regular classrooms. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: Sec. 37.023. TRANSITION FROM ALTERNATIVE EDUCATION PROGRAM TO REGULAR CLASSROOM.
_note: Rule text is entirely unrelated to the proposed property tax change; no conflict exists.
